Bash(cd /Users/xu/Documents/SRC_wechat/miniprogram/images && \\
for name in home home-active activity activity-active shop shop-active profile profile-active; do \\
  echo "" | base64 -d > "${name}.png"; \\
done && \\
for name in add arrow time location user order check rank product points empty default-avatar default-product logo; do \\
  echo "" | base64 -d > "${name}.png"; \\
done && ls -la)

Bash(cd /Users/xu/Documents/SRC_wechat/miniprogram && \\
find . -name "*.wxss" -o -name "*.wxml" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.json" | \\
xargs sed -i '' 's/#4CAF50/#9C27B0/g' && \\
find . -name "*.wxss" -o -name "*.wxml" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.json" | \\
xargs sed -i '' 's/#45a049/#7B1FA2/g' && \\
find . -name "*.wxss" -o -name "*.wxml" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.json" | \\
xargs sed -i '' 's/#C8E6C9/#E1BEE7/g' && \\

<svg width="200" height="200" viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON'
from PIL import Image
import colorsys

# 打开图片
img = Image.open\('/Users/xu/Documents/SRC_wechat/miniprogram/images/IMG_6754.jpg'\)
img = img.convert\('RGB'\)

# 调整大小以便处理
img = img.resize\(\(100, 50\)\)

# 获取主要颜色（粉红色）
colors = img.getcolors\(\)
# 按出现次数排序，排除白色背景
non_white_colors = [\(count, rgb\) for count, rgb in colors if sum\(rgb\) < 700]
non_white_colors.sort\(reverse=True\)

if non_white_colors:
    main_color = non_white_colors[0][1]
    hex_color = '#%02x%02x%02x' % main_color
    print\(f"主要颜色 \(RGB\): {main_color}"\)
    print\(f"主要颜色 \(Hex\): {hex_color}"\)
else:
    print\("未找到主要颜色，使用估算值：#E63B9F"\)
PYTHON)

2. 点击「编译」按钮

5. 点击「我的」→「立即登录」测试登录功能")
